loader.HTML:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="myop:size" content='{"width":"100%","height":"100%"}'>
    <script type="myop/types">
        // =============================================================================
        // MYOP COMPONENT TYPE DEFINITIONS
        // =============================================================================

        /**
         * Data structure passed to myop_init_interface(data)
         */
        interface MyopInitData {
            banner: {
                title: string;
                subtitle: string;
                description: string;
            };
            promptSection: {
                label: string;
                placeholder: string;
            };
            preview: {
                videoUrl: string;
                previewLinkText: string;
            };
            footer: {
                message: string;
                buttons: Array<{
                    id: string;
                    label: string;
                }>;
            };
        }

        /**
         * Actions and payloads for myop_cta_handler(action, payload)
         */
        interface MyopCtaPayloads {
            'build-your-own-clicked': void;
            'preview-live-app-clicked': void;
            'prompt-submitted': { prompt: string };
            'size-requested': {
                width?: number | null;
                height?: number | null;
                minWidth?: number | null;
                maxWidth?: number | null;
                minHeight?: number | null;
                maxHeight?: number | null;
                required?: boolean;
            };
            'use-other-builders-clicked': void;
        }

        // =============================================================================
        // DO NOT EDIT BELOW - Standard Myop type declarations
        // =============================================================================

        declare function myop_init_interface(): MyopInitData;
        declare function myop_init_interface(data: MyopInitData): void;

        declare function myop_cta_handler<K extends keyof MyopCtaPayloads>(
            action: K,
            payload: MyopCtaPayloads[K]
        ): void;
    </script>
    <style>
        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        html,
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-style: normal;
            /* #app-root handles its own scrolling via overflow-y: auto */
        }

        #app-root {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            background: #ffffff;
            padding: 0;
            gap: 4px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        /* Banner Section */
        .banner {
            background: linear-gradient(86deg, rgba(240, 232, 255, 0.40) -6.17%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.40) 76.6%, rgba(255, 237, 231, 0.40) 95.9%), #FFF;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 0;
            padding: 30px 24px 30px 24px;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            flex-grow: 0;
        }

        .banner-content {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }

        .banner-text {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 4px;
            color: #000000;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .banner-title {
            font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            font-size: 30px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 38px;
            color: #000000;
            text-align: center;
            letter-spacing: normal;
            text-transform: none;
            text-decoration: none;
            width: 100%;
        }

        .banner-title p {
            margin: 0;
        }

        .mobile-br {
            display: none;
        }

        .banner-description {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 24px;
            width: 100%;
        }

        /* Main Section */
        .main {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            min-height: 340px;
            position: relative;
            gap: clamp(0px, 20vw - 180px, 16px);
            padding: 0;
        }

        /* Left Panel - Prompt Section */
        .prompt-panel {
            width: 44%;
            max-width: 524px;
            height: 100%;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 0 clamp(8px, 2vw, 24px);
            background: #ffffff;
            border-radius: 8px;
            flex-shrink: 1;
            min-width: 240px;
        }

        .prompt-container {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
            width: 100%;
        }

        .prompt-label {
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-style: normal;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 500;
            line-height: 22px;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            cursor: default;
            margin-bottom: -6px;
        }

        .prompt-label .highlight {
            color: #9747FF;
        }

        .prompt-sublabel {
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-style: normal;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            cursor: default;
        }

        .prompt-input-container {
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 476px;
            min-height: 158px;
            border: 1px solid #e5e4e4;
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 8px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }

        .prompt-textarea {
            border: none;
            outline: none;
            resize: none;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-style: normal;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 18px;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            width: 100%;
            overflow-y: auto;
            min-height: 90px;
            max-height: 120px;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            word-wrap: break-word;
            overflow-wrap: break-word;
        }

        .prompt-textarea::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 3px;
        }

        .prompt-textarea::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        .prompt-textarea::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #d4d4d4;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }

        .prompt-textarea::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
            background: #b0b0b0;
        }

        .prompt-textarea:empty::before {
            content: attr(data-placeholder);
            color: #9ca3af;
            pointer-events: none;
            opacity: 0.8;
        }

        .prompt-textarea .color-preview {
            display: inline-block;
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
            vertical-align: middle;
            margin-right: 3px;
            user-select: none;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .prompt-textarea .color-preview:hover {
            transform: scale(1.2);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }

        .prompt-textarea .color-text {
            /* Ensure color text stays inline with color preview */
        }

        .prompt-textarea .color-keyword {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b, #feca57, #48dbfb, #ff9ff3, #54a0ff);
            background-size: 300% 300%;
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 500;
            animation: colorShift 3s ease infinite;
            border-bottom: 1px dashed rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.5);
            padding-bottom: 1px;
        }

        .prompt-textarea .color-keyword:hover {
            animation-duration: 0.5s;
        }

        @keyframes colorShift {
            0% {
                background-position: 0% 50%;
            }

            50% {
                background-position: 100% 50%;
            }

            100% {
                background-position: 0% 50%;
            }
        }

        .prompt-textarea .color-keyword-preview {
            background: none;
            -webkit-background-clip: unset;
            background-clip: unset;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: unset;
            animation: none;
            border-bottom: none;
            padding-bottom: 0;
            font-weight: normal;
        }

        /* Hidden color picker input */
        #color-picker-input {
            position: absolute;
            opacity: 0;
            width: 0;
            height: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .prompt-bottom {
            display: flex;
            align-items: flex-end;
            gap: 8px;
            width: 100%;
            margin-top: 10px;
        }

        .prompt-actions {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .submit-button {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 4.8px;
            padding: 6.4px 11.2px;
            background: #3E3D3E;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            border: none;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-style: normal;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 14.4px;
            color: #ffffff;
        }

        .submit-button span {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .submit-button:hover {
            background: #9747FF;
            color: #ffffff;
        }

        .submit-button:hover .arrow-icon path {
            stroke: #ffffff;
        }

        .submit-button .arrow-icon {
            width: 11.2px;
            height: 11.2px;
        }

        /* Right Panel - Preview Section */
        .preview-panel {
            width: 56%;
            max-width: 657px;
            height: 100%;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 16px 16px 16px 0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow: hidden;
            flex-shrink: 1;
            min-width: 280px;
            position: relative;
        }

        .preview-background {
            position: absolute;
            width: 95%;
            max-width: 625px;
            aspect-ratio: 16 / 10;
            background: linear-gradient(86deg, rgba(240, 232, 255, 0.40) -6.17%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.40) 76.6%, rgba(255, 237, 231, 0.40) 95.9%), #FFF;
            border: 1px solid #E5E4E4;
            border-radius: 8px;
            left: 0;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
        }

        .preview-container {
            width: 90%;
            max-width: 595px;
            aspect-ratio: 16 / 10;
            border-radius: 9.35px;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: absolute;
            left: 2.3%;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .preview-wrapper {
            flex: 1;
            border-radius: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
        }

        .preview-wrapper::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 1px;
            background: #ffffff;
            z-index: 1;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .preview-video {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: contain;
            display: block;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        /* Preview Link */
        .preview-link-container {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 15px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            z-index: 2;
        }

        .preview-link {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 3.2px;
            padding: 4.9px 9.7px;
            background: #FFF;
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-radius: 25.9px;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-style: normal;
            font-size: 11.7px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 14.6px;
            color: #3E3D3E;
            text-align: right;
            cursor: pointer;
            text-decoration: none;
        }

        .preview-link:hover {
            border: 1px solid #DECCFF;
            background: #F0E8FF;
        }

        .preview-link svg {
            display: flex;
            width: 10.2px;
            height: 10.2px;
            padding: 0.64px;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
        }

        /* Footer Section */
        .footer {
            border-top: 1px solid #e5e4e4;
            padding: 20px 20px 12px 20px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 16px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .footer-message {
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-style: normal;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-style: normal;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            color: #1C1B1F;
        }

        .footer-button {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            padding: 6px 12px;
            height: 30px;
            background: #FFF;
            border: 1px solid #D3D1D5;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: "DM Sans";
            font-style: normal;
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 18px;
            color: #0a090a;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .footer-button:hover {
            border: 1px solid #DECCFF;
            background: #F0E8FF;
        }

        .footer-button svg {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
        }

        .footer-buttons-row {
            display: flex;
            gap: 16px;
        }

        /* Icon styles */
        .icon-16 {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        /* Mobile Dashboard Title - hidden on desktop */
        .mobile-dashboard-title {
            display: none;
        }

        /* ============================================
           RESPONSIVE STYLES
           ============================================ */

        /* Tablet screens - stack layout */
        @media (max-width: 771px) {
            #app-root {
                overflow-y: auto;
                overflow-x: hidden;
                gap: 2px;
            }

            .banner {
                height: auto;
                min-height: 80px;
                padding: 16px 20px;
                margin: 20px 16px 0 16px;
            }

            .banner-title {
                font-size: 24px;
                line-height: 30px;
            }

            .banner-description {
                font-size: 14px;
                line-height: 20px;
            }

            .main {
                flex-direction: column;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 12px;
                padding: 25px 0;
                min-height: auto;
                flex: none;
            }

            .prompt-panel {
                width: 100%;
                max-width: 500px;
                height: auto;
                padding: 0 16px;
                margin: 0 16px;
                min-width: unset;
            }

            .prompt-input-container {
                max-width: 100%;
                min-height: auto;
            }

            .preview-panel {
                width: 100%;
                max-width: 500px;
                height: auto;
                aspect-ratio: 16 / 10;
                padding: 0 16px;
                padding-bottom: 20px;
                margin: 0 16px;
                min-width: unset;
                overflow: visible;
            }

            .preview-background {
                width: calc(100% - 32px);
                max-width: none;
                position: absolute;
                top: 50%;
                left: 50%;
                right: auto;
                transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            }

            .preview-container {
                width: calc(100% - 48px);
                max-width: none;
                position: absolute;
                left: 50%;
                right: auto;
                top: 50%;
                transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            }

            .footer {
                flex-wrap: nowrap;
                gap: clamp(8px, 2vw, 16px);
                padding: clamp(12px, 2vw, 20px) clamp(12px, 2vw, 20px) 12px clamp(12px, 2vw, 20px);
                margin-top: auto;
                justify-content: center;
            }

            .footer-message {
                white-space: nowrap;
            }

            .footer-button {
                padding: 6px clamp(8px, 1.5vw, 12px);
                white-space: nowrap;
            }
        }

        /* Small screens - mobile */
        @media (max-width: 480px) {
            #app-root {
                padding: 0;
                gap: 0;
                scrollbar-width: thin;
                scrollbar-color: #d4d4d4 transparent;
            }

            #app-root::-webkit-scrollbar {
                width: 3px;
            }

            #app-root::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
                background: transparent;
            }

            #app-root::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
                background: #d4d4d4;
                border-radius: 3px;
            }

            #app-root::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
                background: #b0b0b0;
            }

            .banner {
                display: flex;
                padding: 20px 36px;
                align-items: center;
                align-self: stretch;
                margin: 0;
                background: linear-gradient(86deg, rgba(240, 232, 255, 0.40) -6.17%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.40) 76.6%, rgba(255, 237, 231, 0.40) 95.9%), #FFF;
                border-radius: 0;
            }

            .mobile-dashboard-title {
                display: block;
                font-family: "DM Sans";
                font-size: 24px;
                font-weight: 400;
                line-height: 28px;
                color: #3E3D3E;
                text-align: center;
                margin: 0;
                padding: 19px 20px 19px 20px;
                border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E4E4;
            }

            .banner-text {
                text-align: center;
                max-width: 250px;
                margin: 0 auto;
            }

            .banner-title {
                font-family: "DM Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
                font-size: 20px;
                font-weight: 600;
                line-height: 28px;
                text-align: center;
                max-width: 250px;
                padding-top: 0;
            }

            .mobile-br {
                display: inline;
            }

            .banner-description {
                font-size: 16px;
                line-height: 22px;
                text-align: center;
                max-width: 250px;
            }

            .prompt-label {
                font-size: 18px;
                line-height: 22px;
            }

            .prompt-input-container {
                padding: 6px;
            }

            .preview-link {
                padding: 4px 10px;
                font-size: 12px;
            }

            .footer {
                flex-direction: column;
                align-items: center;
                gap: 12px;
            }

            .footer-message {
                text-align: center;
                width: 100%;
            }

            .footer-buttons-row {
                display: flex;
                gap: 16px;
                justify-content: center;
            }
        }
    </style>
    <link
            href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..40,100..900;1,9..40,100..900&display=swap"
            rel="stylesheet">
</head>

<body>
<div id="app-root"></div>

<script>
    (function() {
        let currentState = null;

        const arrowIcon = `<svg class="arrow-icon" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path d="M1 7H13M13 7L7 1M13 7L7 13" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        </svg>`;

        const externalLinkIcon = `<svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path d="M2.14224 0.875C1.80615 0.875 1.48382 1.00406 1.24617 1.23379C1.00851 1.46353 0.875 1.77511 0.875 2.1V11.9C0.875 12.2249 1.00851 12.5365 1.24617 12.7662C1.48382 12.9959 1.80615 13.125 2.14224 13.125H11.8578C12.1939 13.125 12.5162 12.9959 12.7538 12.7662C12.9915 12.5365 13.125 12.2249 13.125 11.9" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
            <path d="M6.125 7.6809L12.9309 0.875M12.9309 0.875L9.21858 0.875M12.9309 0.875L12.9309 4.58731" stroke="#3E3D3E" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        </svg>`;

        const chevronRightIcon = `<svg viewBox="0 0 8 8" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path d="M3 1L6 4L3 7" stroke="#0a090a" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        </svg>`;

        var defaultData = {
            banner: {
                title: "Change a live app,<br class=\"mobile-br\"> one part at a time.",
                subtitle: "",
                description: "This is where you learn to vibe-code inside a real product."
            },
            promptSection: {
                label: "First, let's prompt-edit the <span class=\"highlight\">sign-up form</span>.",
                sublabel: "Here is our prompt but you can make it yours",
                placeholder: `Rebuild the component with an animated, autumn-inspired feel and a more prominent Google sign-up.`
            },
            preview: {
                videoUrl: "https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/b31c7072-e13c-4966-8446-4d69d378001a/Playground__4_.mp4",
                previewLinkText: "Preview"
            },
            footer: {
                message: "Ready for your next step?",
                buttons: [
                    { id: "build-from-scratch", label: "Build from scratch" }
                ]
            }
        };

        function buildHTML(data) {
            var banner = data.banner || defaultData.banner;
            var promptSection = data.promptSection || defaultData.promptSection;
            var preview = data.preview || defaultData.preview;
            var footer = data.footer || defaultData.footer;
            var buttons = footer.buttons || defaultData.footer.buttons;

            return `
                <div class="mobile-dashboard-title">Playground</div>
                <div class="banner">
                    <div class="banner-content">
                        <div class="banner-text">
                            <div class="banner-title">
                                <p>${banner.title || defaultData.banner.title}</p>
                                <p>${banner.subtitle || defaultData.banner.subtitle}</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="banner-description">${banner.description || defaultData.banner.description}</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="main">
                    <div class="prompt-panel">
                        <div class="prompt-container">
                            <p class="prompt-label">${promptSection.label || defaultData.promptSection.label}</p>
                            <p class="prompt-sublabel">${promptSection.sublabel || defaultData.promptSection.sublabel}</p>
                            <div class="prompt-input-container">
                                <input type="color" id="color-picker-input">
                                <div class="prompt-textarea" id="prompt-input" contenteditable="true">${promptSection.placeholder || defaultData.promptSection.placeholder}</div>
                                <div class="prompt-bottom">
                                    <div class="prompt-actions"></div>
                                    <button class="submit-button" id="submit-btn" type="button">
                                        <span>Ready, set, vibe!</span>
                                        ${arrowIcon}
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="preview-panel">
                        <div class="preview-background"></div>
                        <div class="preview-container">
                            <div class="preview-wrapper">
                                <video class="preview-video" src="${preview.videoUrl || defaultData.preview.videoUrl}" autoplay muted playsinline></video>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="preview-link-container">
                            <button class="preview-link" id="preview-link-btn">
                                ${externalLinkIcon}
                                <span>${preview.previewLinkText || defaultData.preview.previewLinkText}</span>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="footer">
                    <span class="footer-message">${footer.message || defaultData.footer.message}</span>
                    <div class="footer-buttons-row">
                        ${buttons.map(btn => `
                            <button class="footer-button" data-action="${btn.id || ''}">
                                <span>${btn.label || ''}</span>
                            </button>
                        `).join('')}
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
        }

        function autoResizeTextarea() {
            const textarea = document.getElementById('prompt-input');
            if (!textarea) return;
            textarea.style.height = 'auto';
            textarea.style.height = textarea.scrollHeight + 'px';
        }

        function positionPreviewLink() {
            const bg = document.querySelector('.preview-background');
            const linkContainer = document.querySelector('.preview-link-container');
            if (!bg || !linkContainer) return;

            const bgRect = bg.getBoundingClientRect();
            const panel = document.querySelector('.preview-panel');
            const panelRect = panel.getBoundingClientRect();

            // Position relative to preview-panel
            const bottom = panelRect.bottom - bgRect.bottom - 13;
            const centerX = bgRect.left + bgRect.width / 2 - panelRect.left;

            linkContainer.style.bottom = bottom + 'px';
            linkContainer.style.left = centerX + 'px';
            linkContainer.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%)';
        }

        // Color detection utilities
        function escapeHtml(text) {
            const div = document.createElement('div');
            div.textContent = text;
            return div.innerHTML;
        }

        function getInputText(promptInput) {
            // Get plain text without color preview elements
            const clone = promptInput.cloneNode(true);
            clone.querySelectorAll('.color-preview').forEach(el => el.remove());
            clone.querySelectorAll('br').forEach(br => br.replaceWith('\n'));
            clone.querySelectorAll('div, p').forEach(el => {
                if (el.previousSibling) el.before('\n');
            });
            return clone.textContent || '';
        }

        function getInputSelection(promptInput) {
            const sel = window.getSelection();
            if (!sel.rangeCount || !promptInput.contains(sel.anchorNode)) return { start: 0, end: 0 };

            const range = sel.getRangeAt(0);
            const preRange = document.createRange();
            preRange.selectNodeContents(promptInput);
            preRange.setEnd(range.startContainer, range.startOffset);

            const clone = preRange.cloneContents();
            clone.querySelectorAll('.color-preview').forEach(el => el.remove());
            const start = clone.textContent.length;

            preRange.setEnd(range.endContainer, range.endOffset);
            const clone2 = preRange.cloneContents();
            clone2.querySelectorAll('.color-preview').forEach(el => el.remove());
            const end = clone2.textContent.length;

            return { start, end };
        }

        function setInputCursor(promptInput, pos) {
            const sel = window.getSelection();
            const range = document.createRange();

            let currentPos = 0;
            const walker = document.createTreeWalker(promptInput, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, null, false);
            let node;
            while ((node = walker.nextNode())) {
                if (currentPos + node.length >= pos) {
                    range.setStart(node, pos - currentPos);
                    range.collapse(true);
                    sel.removeAllRanges();
                    sel.addRange(range);
                    return;
                }
                currentPos += node.length;
            }

            // Fallback: put cursor at end
            range.selectNodeContents(promptInput);
            range.collapse(false);
            sel.removeAllRanges();
            sel.addRange(range);
        }

        function renderInputColors(promptInput) {
            const text = getInputText(promptInput);
            const colorRegex = /(#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}\b|rgba?\s*\(\s*\d+\s*,\s*\d+\s*,\s*\d+\s*(?:,\s*[\d.]+\s*)?\))/gi;
            const colorKeywordRegex = /\bcolor\b/gi;

            const hasColors = colorRegex.test(text);
            const hasColorKeyword = colorKeywordRegex.test(text);

            // Check if there are existing color spans that need to be cleaned up
            const hasExistingColorSpans = promptInput.querySelector('.color-keyword, .color-preview') !== null;

            // Skip if nothing to render AND no existing spans to clean up
            if (!hasColors && !hasColorKeyword && !hasExistingColorSpans) return;

            // If no colors/keywords but has existing spans, just set plain text
            if (!hasColors && !hasColorKeyword && hasExistingColorSpans) {
                const { start } = getInputSelection(promptInput);
                promptInput.textContent = text;
                setInputCursor(promptInput, start);
                return;
            }

            // Save cursor position
            const { start } = getInputSelection(promptInput);

            // Combined regex for colors and "color" keyword
            const combinedRegex = /(#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}\b|rgba?\s*\(\s*\d+\s*,\s*\d+\s*,\s*\d+\s*(?:,\s*[\d.]+\s*)?\)|\bcolor\b)/gi;

            // Build HTML with color previews and clickable "color" keywords
            let html = '';
            let lastIndex = 0;
            let match;

            let colorIndex = 0;
            while ((match = combinedRegex.exec(text)) !== null) {
                html += escapeHtml(text.slice(lastIndex, match.index));

                if (match[1].toLowerCase() === 'color') {
                    html += `<span class="color-keyword">${escapeHtml(match[1])}</span>`;
                } else {
                    html += `<span class="color-preview" data-color-index="${colorIndex}" style="background:${match[1]};" contenteditable="false"></span><span class="color-text" data-color-index="${colorIndex}">${escapeHtml(match[1])}</span>`;
                    colorIndex++;
                }
                lastIndex = combinedRegex.lastIndex;
            }
            html += escapeHtml(text.slice(lastIndex));

            promptInput.innerHTML = html;

            // Restore cursor position
            setInputCursor(promptInput, start);
        }

        window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
            autoResizeTextarea();
            positionPreviewLink();
        });

        function attachEventListeners() {
            const submitBtn = document.getElementById('submit-btn');
            const promptInput = document.getElementById('prompt-input');
            const previewLinkBtn = document.getElementById('preview-link-btn');
            const colorPickerInput = document.getElementById('color-picker-input');

            let activeColorPreview = null;
            let activeColorText = null;
            let activeColorKeyword = null;

            if (promptInput) {
                autoResizeTextarea();
                // Initial color rendering
                renderInputColors(promptInput);

                promptInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
                    autoResizeTextarea();
                    renderInputColors(promptInput);
                });

                // Position color picker near clicked element
                function positionColorPicker(element) {
                    const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
                    const container = document.querySelector('.prompt-input-container');
                    const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect();

                    colorPickerInput.style.position = 'absolute';
                    colorPickerInput.style.left = (rect.left - containerRect.left + rect.width / 2) + 'px';
                    colorPickerInput.style.top = (rect.bottom - containerRect.top + 4) + 'px';
                }

                // Color picker click handling
                promptInput.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    const colorPreview = e.target.closest('.color-preview');
                    const colorKeyword = e.target.closest('.color-keyword');

                    if (colorKeyword && colorKeyword.textContent.toLowerCase() === 'color') {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        e.stopPropagation();

                        activeColorKeyword = colorKeyword;
                        activeColorPreview = null;
                        activeColorText = null;

                        colorPickerInput.value = '#8B5CF6';
                        positionColorPicker(colorKeyword);
                        colorPickerInput.click();
                    } else if (colorPreview) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        e.stopPropagation();

                        activeColorPreview = colorPreview;
                        activeColorKeyword = null;
                        const colorIdx = colorPreview.dataset.colorIndex;
                        activeColorText = promptInput.querySelector(`.color-text[data-color-index="${colorIdx}"]`);

                        const currentColor = activeColorText?.textContent || '#000000';
                        let hexColor = currentColor;
                        if (hexColor.match(/^#[0-9a-fA-F]{3}$/)) {
                            hexColor = '#' + hexColor[1] + hexColor[1] + hexColor[2] + hexColor[2] + hexColor[3] + hexColor[3];
                        }
                        colorPickerInput.value = hexColor.slice(0, 7);
                        positionColorPicker(colorPreview);
                        colorPickerInput.click();
                    }
                });
            }

            if (colorPickerInput) {
                colorPickerInput.addEventListener('input', function(e) {
                    const newColor = e.target.value.toUpperCase();

                    if (activeColorKeyword) {
                        if (!activeColorKeyword.classList.contains('color-keyword-preview')) {
                            activeColorKeyword.classList.add('color-keyword-preview');
                            activeColorKeyword.innerHTML = `<span class="color-preview" style="background:${newColor};" contenteditable="false"></span><span class="color-text">${newColor}</span>`;
                            activeColorKeyword.style.cssText = '';
                        } else {
                            const preview = activeColorKeyword.querySelector('.color-preview');
                            const text = activeColorKeyword.querySelector('.color-text');
                            if (preview) preview.style.background = newColor;
                            if (text) text.textContent = newColor;
                        }
                    } else if (activeColorPreview && activeColorText) {
                        activeColorPreview.style.background = newColor;
                        activeColorText.textContent = newColor;
                    }
                });

                colorPickerInput.addEventListener('change', function() {
                    if (activeColorKeyword && promptInput) {
                        activeColorKeyword = null;
                        renderInputColors(promptInput);
                    }
                    activeColorPreview = null;
                    activeColorText = null;
                    activeColorKeyword = null;
                    if (promptInput) promptInput.focus();
                });
            }

            if (submitBtn && promptInput) {
                submitBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    const prompt = getInputText(promptInput).trim();
                    if (prompt) {
                        window.myop_cta_handler('prompt-submitted', { prompt: prompt });
                    }
                });
            }

            if (previewLinkBtn) {
                previewLinkBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    window.myop_cta_handler('preview-live-app-clicked', undefined);
                });
            }

            const footerButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.footer-button');
            footerButtons.forEach(function(btn) {
                btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    const action = btn.getAttribute('data-action');
                    if (action) {
                        window.myop_cta_handler(action, undefined);
                    }
                });
            });

            // Video click to replay
            const previewVideo = document.querySelector('.preview-video');
            if (previewVideo) {
                previewVideo.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    previewVideo.currentTime = 0;
                    previewVideo.play();
                });
            }
        }

        function render(data) {
            currentState = data;
            const container = document.getElementById('app-root');
            container.innerHTML = buildHTML(data);
            attachEventListeners();
            positionPreviewLink();
        }

        window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
            if (!data) return currentState;
            render(data);
        };

        window.myop_cta_handler = function(action_id, payload) {
            // Will be overridden by host application
            console.log('CTA:', action_id, payload);
            if (action_id === 'prompt-submitted' && payload && payload.prompt) {
                alert('Prompt: ' + payload.prompt);
            }
        };
    })();
</script>

<script id="myop_preview">
    window.myop_init_interface({
        banner: {
            title: "Change a live app,<br class=\"mobile-br\"> one part at a time.",
            subtitle: "",
            description: "This is where you learn to vibe-code inside a real product."
        },
        promptSection: {
            label: "First, let's prompt-edit the <span class='highlight'>sign-up form</span>.",
            sublabel: "Here is our prompt but you can make it yours",
            placeholder: "Rebuild the component with an animated, autumn-inspired feel and a more prominent Google sign-up."
        },
        preview: {
            videoUrl: "https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/b31c7072-e13c-4966-8446-4d69d378001a/Playground__4_.mp4",
            previewLinkText: "Preview"
        },
        footer: {
            message: "Ready for your next step?",
            buttons: [
                { id: "build-from-scratch", label: "Build from scratch" }
            ]
        }
    });
</script>

</body>

</html>
